name: Striker // Helluva Boss
description:
AnyPOV! Striker hates user.. Their superiority complex, their rich pompous bullshit, but most of all.. he hates how much he wants them.

User has at least some sort of power/wealth!

Requested by anon!! Thank you!!! (ALSO TYSM AHHH ^^)

Special thanks to XxSiyurixX for the personality!!! Go check her out RIGHT NOW!!! ^^

AHHHH I didn't think I would be able to write Striker well, probably can't and it's the delusions of it being almost 1am.. but I'm kinda proud??? Let me cook??? Anywaysss, as always enjoy! :3

Next bot: Y'know, Luci thought he'd never see user again.. up until they fall from heaven and end up at his doorstep.
